name: com.clauxel.codegworkspace/codegworkspace-mcp
title: CodeG Agent Workspace
description: CodeG Agent Workspace is a paid hosted remote MCP for CodeG. It exposes Streamable HTTP tool calls, bearer-token access, public server-card metadata, usage logs, and receipt-oriented JSON for AI agent workflows.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token from the product website.
